channel.title: Journal of Pediatric Endocrinology and Metabolism
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Journal of Pediatric Endocrinology and Metabolism

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2025-frontmatter3

item.title: Thyroid surgery in pediatric age: a 10-year experience at a single center and literature review
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0464

item.title: Differentiated thyroid cancer in adolescents – does extent of disease at presentation differ with age?
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0289

item.title: Evaluation of iodine and selenium level and thyroid functions in patients with cystic fibrosis
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0566

item.title: Interpreting positive celiac serology in children with new-onset type 1 diabetes
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0070

item.title: Elastographic evaluation for fatty liver disease in north Indian children and adolescents with type 1 diabetes
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0627

item.title: Diagnostic value of fasting insulin and insulin-like growth factor-1 levels in girls with central precocious puberty
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0479

item.title: Clinical outcomes of switching to lonapegsomatropin from somatropin for treatment of pediatric growth hormone deficiency
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0496

item.title: Development of a disease diagnostic model to predict the occurrence of central precocious puberty of female
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0419

item.title: Adrenal hypoandrogenism in adolescents with premature ovarian insufficiency
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0415

item.title: The clinical presentation and genetic diagnosis of Tangier disease in the pediatric age group
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0335

item.title: Clinical and genetic diagnosis of first cohort of differences of sexual development in the Iranian population
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0352

item.title: Effect of a GnRH injection on kisspeptin levels in girls with suspected precocious puberty: a randomized-controlled pilot study
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0606

item.title: Coexistence of phenylketonuria and tyrosinemia type 3: challenges in the dietary management
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0378

item.title: Acrodermatitis dysmetabolica: lessons from two pediatric cases
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0542

item.title: Dramatic response to Evinacumab in a North Indian girl with homozygous familial hypercholesterolemia
item.description: Article by Sonali Arora, Sayan Banerjee, Arun George, Anju Bala, Shyam Kumar Singh Thingnam, Manoj Kumar Rohit, Devi Dayal DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/jpem-2024-0506
